name: VictimLink BC
description: Confidential, multilingual crisis support and referral service for victims of family and sexual violence.

name: Surrey Women's Centre
description: 24-hour emergency response for victims of sexual assault and domestic violence in Surrey.

name: WAVAW Rape Crisis Centre
description: Provides 24-hour crisis line, hospital accompaniment, and counselling for survivors of sexualized violence.

name: Battered Women's Support Services (BWSS)
description: Offers crisis line, counselling, legal advocacy, and support for women facing intimate partner violence.

name: Victim Services - Vancouver Police Department
description: Provides emotional support, safety planning, and court updates for crime victims in Vancouver.

name: Burnaby RCMP Victim Services
description: Offers assistance and referrals to victims of crime or trauma within Burnaby.
address: 6355 Deer Lake Avenue, Burnaby, BC V5G 2J2

name: Family Services of Greater Vancouver - Victim Services
description: Provides trauma-informed counselling, court support, and safety planning for victims of crime and abuse.

name: MOSAIC Victim Support Services
description: Assists immigrant and refugee victims of crime, offering counselling and language-accessible support.

name: Options Community Services - Surrey
description: Provides victim support, counselling, and outreach for survivors of domestic and sexual violence.

name: Legal Aid BC
description: Provides free legal help and information for people facing legal issues including assault, family violence, and criminal matters.
